response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software craftsman with web, mobile, and some embedded experience, but the role requires deep expertise in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, hardware-software co-design, and deep learning workload optimization — none of which appear in the resume. The technical background is almost entirely application-layer (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang web services, GIS platforms) with no demonstrated work on chip architecture, GPU/SIMD/MIMD, or DNN training/inference optimization.
strengths: Long track record of senior IC software engineering across diverse stacks
Some low-latency / high-throughput backend experience at Sociomantic
Strong testing/TDD discipline and knowledge-sharing background
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, hardware architecture, or AI accelerator experience
No deep learning / DNN training or inference optimization background
Educational path (BS + ~13 yrs) is in software, not hardware/architecture; no GPU/SIMD/MIMD exposure

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or DNN optimization experience
